title: Choose the default unblock loop
summary: Lock the first interaction pattern for the product surface so the app can bias toward the right human behavior.

response.prompt: What should the first version of humanctl optimize for?

options.label: Fast answers
options.description: Bias the surface toward quick, unblock-now decisions with crisp prompts and fast response handling.
